name: Reverse Contact API
what_it_does: Reverse Contact REST API — email-to-LinkedIn profile enrichment service that takes an email address and returns the matching LinkedIn profile, company information, and professional details, enabling agents to enrich contact records with social and professional data.
use_cases: Agents enriching CRM contact records with LinkedIn profile data (title, company, location) from email addresses
Lead scoring — agents using LinkedIn data fetched via Reverse Contact to qualify inbound leads by seniority and company size
ICP matching — agents checking if inbound email signups match ideal customer profile by enriching with LinkedIn company data
Email-to-company mapping — agents identifying which company an email belongs to for account-based marketing workflows
Data deduplication — agents finding duplicate contacts by matching email addresses to canonical LinkedIn profiles
not_for: Finding email addresses — Reverse Contact does the reverse (email → profile); use Prospeo or Hunter.io for email discovery
Consumer social enrichment — focused on professional/B2B LinkedIn data, not consumer social profiles
High-volume bulk enrichment — credit model becomes expensive at scale; use enterprise data providers for millions of records
best_when: You have email addresses and need to enrich them with LinkedIn professional data (title, company, seniority) for lead scoring or CRM enrichment.
avoid_when: You need phone numbers, mailing addresses, or consumer data — Reverse Contact is specifically LinkedIn professional enrichment.

auth.notes: API key from Reverse Contact dashboard. Passed as X-Api-Key header. Credit-based model — each enrichment consumes credits. Single key with full account access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial with limited credits for testing
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter: $49/month (1,000 credits); Growth: $149/month (5,000 credits); Pro: $399/month (20,000 credits)
pricing.notes: Credit-based pricing. Each email enrichment consumes 1 credit. Credits expire monthly (no rollover on most plans). Annual plans available with discount.

performance.rate_limits: 60 req/min on standard plans; bulk CSV upload available for higher volumes

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Simple REST API. Response includes LinkedIn profile URL, name, title, company, and location. 'not found' responses are clearly indicated. Error responses include descriptive messages.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Same email input always returns same enrichment result. Credits consumed on every call including repeats — agents must cache results to avoid duplicate credit consumption.
known_agent_gotchas: Credits consumed on every call even for emails with no LinkedIn match — agents should maintain local cache to prevent redundant API calls
LinkedIn data freshness varies — Reverse Contact's database may lag LinkedIn profile updates by days or weeks
'Email not found' is a valid response, not an error — agents must handle both found and not-found paths explicitly
Personal email addresses (gmail, yahoo) rarely have LinkedIn matches — focus on professional/work emails for best match rates
GDPR requirements apply to how enriched data is stored and used — document legal basis for processing enriched professional data

security_score_components.security_notes: GDPR compliant — EU-focused company. TLS enforced. No SOC2. API key with no scope granularity. Agents must ensure GDPR compliance for enriched professional contact data storage and use.
